_comment: SYNTHETIC DEMO DATA — fictional papers, sources, and URLs invented for the News Scout sub-agent demo. None of this describes any real publication.

items.title: Synthetic Demo: Distal Loop Dynamics Modulate bnAb Access to a Model Epitope
items.snippet: Fictional demo finding: in a synthetic MD study, a distal loop conformation correlated with altered antibody-binding-site exposure on a model HIV Env-like antigen.

items.title: Synthetic Demo: A Coarse-Grained Approach to Membrane Protein Folding
items.snippet: Fictional demo finding, deliberately unrelated to the lab's interest tags — used to test negative filtering in search_papers.

items.title: Synthetic Demo: Affinity Maturation Trajectories Under Permissive Selection
items.snippet: Fictional demo finding: ties germinal center selection stringency to bnAb lineage outcomes.
